title: Codereview pass 2: Consider auto-update of min_epoch on epoch advance
description: Currently, set_min_epoch must be called explicitly after boot. Consider automatically updating min_epoch in check_and_update when a frame with a higher epoch is accepted (i.e., min_epoch = max(min_epoch, accepted_epoch)). This would provide rolling protection without requiring the caller to track and persist each peer's epoch separately. Trade-off: adds state mutation and complexity. Current approach is simpler and explicit. Location: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs:222-224
close_reason: min_epoch auto-update suggestion - design decision, current approach is valid
